titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 44

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=152 status=live modified=2017-01-30 19:28:04.228171+00 | translation moa=153 status=live modified=2016-06-07 14:30:42.891832+00

p.cl: Omnibus Sancte Matris ecclesie filiis . Adam filius Abrahae . de Lura . Salutem .

Sciant
omnes tam presentes quam futuri .

me dedisse ⁊ concessisse ⁊ hac mea carta con
firmasse deo ⁊ ecclesie Sancti Andree ⁊ Canonicis ibidem deo seruientibus ⁊ serui
turis . tres acras terre in lura . cum tofto uno . in perpetuam elemosinam  ⁊ cum
omni libertate . sine omni seruitio seculari . ⁊ exactione . Cum communi pastura quattuor
bobus . ⁊ totidem uaccis . ⁊ duobus equis . ⁊ quadraginta ouibus .

Testibus . Michaele
filio Symonis . Radulfo Capellano . Dauid ruffo . Roberto filio Ederardi . ⁊ Gi
leberto fratre eius .

div.p: To all sons of Holy Mother Church, Adam son of Abraham of Lour, Greeting: Let all men know, present as well as to come, that I have given and have granted and by this my charter have made firm, to God and to the church of St Andrews and to the Canons in that place serving God now and in the future, three acres of land in Lour, with one toft, in perpetual alms, and with every liberty, without any secular service and exaction. With common pasture for four oxen, as many cows, two horses, and forty sheep. As witnesses: Michael son of Simon; Ralph the Chaplain; David Ruff; Robert son of Adelard, and Gilbert his brother.
